title: Orochi’s Rage and Komurasaki’s Defiance
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Kiku, Kyoshiro, Toko as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Sanji, Robin, Nami, and others move through the capital as Orochi’s obsession with Komurasaki turns violent.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Listen up, men! Now that you are here,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Allow me to speak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This year marks the Twentieth since the death of open Kozuki!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His wife spoke of a year of revenge! That Oden's will lives on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Here he goes again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you remember the extraordinary strength of Oden's retain- Ers, the nine Red Sheaths?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They're all dead...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their leader, Kinemon, is a man to send heads rolling!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: He was

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I barely remember him any more...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, twenty years later, they've begun their plans for revenge in this country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Slowly, but surely, they are coming for my head!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We've already buried countless followers of open...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you are still afraid of the Kozu- Ki?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaido's already taken care of them,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But in Kuri, the Yokozuna and Jack's men were attacked!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the Capital's Soba seller! A Ronin even attacked some YAKUZA at a lodge!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All of this may have occurred at Kinemon's instruct- Tions!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would love nothing more than to come across Foxfire Kinemon

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Or any of his Samurai!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd cut him to bits with one stroke and lay him before you!

dialogue.speaker: Kyoshiro
dialogue.text: Gufufu Fufu Fufu! Very reassuring, Kyoshiro.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oden died! Before my very eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But his son, momenosuke, is still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We have yet to find his body!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kozuki bloodline has not yet run dry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These fools are plotting the return of the Kozuki clan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: This guy's dream- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And they're obviously after Kaido's head, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PPPPFFFTT! HOW MUCH OF A COWARD ARE YOU?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! I wanna laugh, but if I do, they'll kill me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's he afraid of?! Kaido's by his side! No human can kill that monster!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Orochi appears to believe in these legends to a fault.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his underlings don't. Can't say I blame them.

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Ahaha hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No! Who laughed?! hold it in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHATA-?! who the hell is that! Knock it off! He'll kill ya!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Ahaha hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: O-TOKO!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: B- But, everyone's making fun of the Lord!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Who is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is someone... laughing at me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who is that?! Please! Just get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: Ahaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: I can't stop! I'm so sorry! Ahahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I know I'm not supposed to, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A child?!

dialogue.speaker: Komurasaki
dialogue.text: The Courtesan's Kamuro! Stop her!

dialogue.speaker: Toko
dialogue.text: O-TOKO!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: How unplea- Sant. I am shogun.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ARE YOU SAYING I AM AFRAID OF THE LAST WORDS OF A WOMAN 20 YEARS AGO?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: KyaAah! No! Stop!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I am the Victor. I beat open...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Stop this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My LORD!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She's still a child!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The Courts- San?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's no use! She's always scheming!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Keep your mouth shut, Komurasaki.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 59 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
